Container.Name: ddns-agent
Container.Overview: DDNS Agent is a lightweight, modern Dynamic DNS updater with an integrated web panel. It supports 50+ DNS providers and features a beautiful management interface with real-time log streaming, webhook notifications, and automatic IP change detection. First-time setup: Open the web panel and create your admin account.
Container.Description: DDNS Agent - Lightweight Dynamic DNS Updater with Web Panel. Supports 50+ providers including Cloudflare, DuckDNS, GoDaddy, Hetzner, Namecheap, and more. Features: Real-time logs, webhook notifications, IPv4/IPv6, encrypted credentials, auto-backup.
Container.Changes: ### 1.0.0 - Initial release - 52 DNS provider support - Web panel with dark/light theme - Real-time SSE log streaming - Webhook notifications (Discord, Telegram, Gotify, Generic) - Encrypted credential storage - Config export/import - Automatic database backups - Multi-language support (EN, DE)

Config.Name: Data Directory
Config.Description: Persistent data storage (database, backups, encryption key)

Config.Name: Update Interval
Config.Description: How often to check for IP changes (e.g. 5m, 10m, 30m, 1h)

Config.Name: Cooldown Period
Config.Description: Minimum time between updates for the same record

Config.Name: HTTP Timeout
Config.Description: Timeout for HTTP requests to IP check services and provider APIs

Config.Name: Backup Retention
Config.Description: Number of daily database backups to keep

Config.Name: JWT Secret
Config.Description: Fixed JWT secret for persistent sessions (auto-generated if empty)

Config.Name: Encryption Key
Config.Description: AES-256 encryption key as 64 hex chars (auto-generated and saved to /data/.key if empty)
